## Summary

Describe the change and the failure mode it addresses.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] UA interface checked
- [ ] EN interface checked
- [ ] Mobile touch behavior checked when relevant
- [ ] Raw and MACS results remain visibly separate
- [ ] No external runtime dependency or telemetry added

## Data safety

- [ ] No client key photo, VIN, address, or EXIF location is included
- [ ] Any sample data is synthetic or explicitly authorized for public release
- [ ] No proprietary commercial key-code database content is included

## Risk

Explain whether the change can create a wrong high-confidence candidate and how that risk was tested.
